2606.11766.title: Fast Speech Foundation Model Distillation Using Interleaved Stacking
2606.11766.paper_summary: Distilling a large speech foundation model (SFM) into an efficient student model has been successfully applied to low-resource environments. Although distillation reduces inference latency, it requires an additional student model training. However, the training efficiency of SFM distillation remains underexplored. In this work, we explore training acceleration of SFM distillation to speed up model deployment. We examine the potential of stacking, in which the model depth is progressively increased through training until the target model depth is reached. While existing stacking methods improve training speed, they suffer from performance degradation. To handle this limitation, we propose interleaved stacking, a novel stacking method that consistently preserves layer position throughout the stacking process. This property is particularly critical in SFMs, in which each layer encodes distinct layer-specific knowledge. We validate the effectiveness of the proposed method on SUPERB.
2606.11766.paper_summary_zh: 將大型語音基礎模型（SFM）蒸餾成高效的學生模型已成功應用於資源有限的環境中。<lb/>儘管蒸餾減少了推理延遲，但它需要額外的學生模型訓練。<lb/>然而，SFM蒸餾的訓練效率仍然未被充分探索。<lb/>在這項工作中，我們探索了SFM蒸餾的訓練加速，以加快模型部署。<lb/>我們檢視了堆疊的潛力，其中模型深度透過訓練逐步增加，直到達到目標模型深度。<lb/>雖然現有的堆疊方法提高了訓練速度，但它們遭遇了性能下降的問題。<lb/>為了解決這一限制，我們提出了交錯堆疊，一種新穎的堆疊方法，該方法在整個堆疊過程中始終保持層位置。<lb/>這一特性在SFM中尤為關鍵，因為每一層編碼了獨特的層特定知識。<lb/>我們在SUPERB上驗證了所提方法的有效性。
2606.11766.author: Eungbeom Kim et.al.
